This is Andy Brown, the sitting Travis County Judge — i.e. an elected official giving to his own Commissioners Court colleagues. The $508 is two gifts: $250 to Ann Howard (2021-10-26) and $257.50 to Jeff Travillion (2021-11-09), both made while he was County Judge. Although these 2021 rows carry no address, other 'Brown, Andrew' rows elsewhere in the Travis dataset do, and every one of them is the County Judge: George Morales's filings list him at Austin 78762 and 78703 with occupation 'County Judge' and employer 'Travis County', and Travillion's 2023/2024 rows ($500 each) also carry 78762. FEC independently confirms 'BROWN, ANDREW' at zip 787626061 (= 78762-6061) with employer TRAVIS COUNTY and occupation COUNTY JUDGE ($1,000 each to Harris for President and Harris Victory Fund, 2024-07-12) — an exact match to the 78762 anchoring rows. CAUTION — the batch's 'fec_donation_count: 406 / lean 0.875' is conflated: FEC 'BROWN, ANDREW / AUSTIN TX' returns only ~71 records spread across clearly different people (Tesla managers at 78759, a Generac SVP at 78737, a Google account manager at 78704, a general contractor at 78747). The judge's own records are a small slice; treat the 406 count and 0.875 lean as unreliable.

The filing's occupation 'County Judge' and employer 'Travis County' match exactly, and the zip 78701 matches his official downtown office address at 700 Lavaca St., Austin, TX 78701.
